subject: feat(ui): float address search bar above map on mobile web
body:
Moved LocationSearch from inside the BottomSheet to a floating bar at the
top of the screen, above the map. This gives the search input permanent
visibility without competing with the bottom sheet for space.

Bottom sheet now contains only filters and station list. Search bar has
a shadow for legibility over the map background.

Tags: ui, mobile-web, layout
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: pwa-fixes
Semver: minor
